docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,640.00 FILED BY CONANT, CLARK AS TO DEFENDANT KAUS, IRENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONANT, CLARK AS TO DEFENDANT KAUS, IRENE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-21-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAUS, IRENE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CLARK CONANT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IRENE KAUS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CONANT, CLARK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONANT, CLARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAUS, IRENE $2,010.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,025.00, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT RETAINED THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IN BAD FAITH AND PLAINTIFF'S ACTUAL DAMAGE WAS $510.00. TOTAL AWARD INCLUDES $200.00 PENALTY, ACTUAL DAMAGE OF $510.00, AND SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $1400.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT KAUS, IRENE MAILED TO RESPONDENT CONANT, CLARK
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (D206)

MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025 - APPEARANCE FOR APPELLANT. NO APPEARANCE FOR RESPONDENT. ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON AUG-20-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 503, JUDGE FENG. (206)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-20-25 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 503
SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025 DISMISSED - NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. MATTER NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: NOT PRESENT. (503)
